message:
fix(types): resolve TypeScript narrowing issues with window

Fix TypeScript type narrowing errors where checking
"requestIdleCallback" in window causes window to be
inferred as type 'never' in the else branch.

Solution: Use global setTimeout/clearTimeout instead of
window.setTimeout/window.clearTimeout in fallback branches.

Affected files:
- hero.tsx: 3D scene lazy loading fallback
- command-palette.tsx: search index prefetch fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
